overall.description: A first-person walk along a rural highway in a game engine environment (resembling GTA V), featuring a prominent mountain backdrop. The camera moves from the roadside shoulder, past a gas station billboard, across the highway, and approaches a residential house with a real estate sign.

events.description: black SUV passes by on the road from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder next to the guardrail

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the highway

entered.detail: large rocky mountain dominating the background
metal highway guardrail with wooden posts
wooden utility pole with street lamp and wires

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rural highway shoulder with a metal guardrail on the left and open road on the right. A large mountain dominates the distant background while a black SUV passes by on the road. The area is lined with pine trees and utility poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway curve approaching gas station sign

events.description: green truck passes by on the road heading away from camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside as the highway curves gently to the right

notable_agents.action: green truck driving away on the highway

entered.detail: large green gas station billboard with yellow shield logo

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway curve where the guardrail ends. A prominent green gas station billboard comes into view on the right side of the road. A green truck passes by on the asphalt as the terrain becomes more arid with desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential roadside with real estate signage

events.description: crossing the highway from the right shoulder to the left side

agents.ego_description: crossing the highway to the other side while approaching residential houses

entered.detail: single-story white house with covered porch
purple and white real estate for-sale sign
rusted orange vehicle parked near the house

segments.scene_description: Crossing the asphalt highway to the left side where residential properties begin. A white house with a real estate sign and an abandoned rusted car become visible. The green gas station sign and utility poles recede into the background as the mountain shifts to the left of the frame.

events.description: entering the driveway of the red house, moving from public road to private property

agents.ego_description: walking up the dirt driveway toward the front entrance of the red house

entered.detail: single-story red-brown house with white trim and stone foundation
low stone wall bordering the property
green dumpster near the house entrance

segments.scene_description: Approaching the red house up a dirt driveway, passing a stone wall and green dumpster. The camera moves from the public highway into the private residential space, with the house facade becoming the dominant feature as the road recedes from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rural highway shoulder that gradually transitions into a private residential driveway. It begins by walking alongside a metal guardrail and pine trees with a massive mountain dominating the horizon as a black SUV passes on the road. As the camera follows the curve of the highway, the guardrail ends and the terrain becomes more arid, bringing a prominent green gas station billboard into view while a green truck drives by. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the asphalt toward the opposite side of the road, where the mountain slides to the left and a white house with a real estate sign and a rusted car emerge. Finally, the movement leads up a dirt driveway past a stone wall and a green dumpster, moving away from the public road until the facade of a red house fills the frame.
